title: Form limits?
excerpt: Is there a limit to the number of files/photos that can be added to a form before submission? I know there is a file size limit, but is there a number of items limit?

posts.author: JPope (Jackie Pope)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a limit to the number of files/photos that can be added to a form before submission? I know there is a file size limit, but is there a number of items limit?

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JPope

I’ve uploaded baches of 300 files with no issue. If you are looking for an official limitation, there is no mention of this in the file upload support page, you might consider reaching out to monday support about it.
